channel.title: pouch on My Crocheted Bags
channel.description: Recent content in pouch on My Crocheted Bags

item.title: Ocean Wave Pouch
item.description: Description This charming pouch captures the beauty and movement of ocean waves through intricate wave stitch crochet. Made with soft, durable 100% cotton yarn, it’s the perfect size for holding your daily essentials - from cosmetics and jewelry to coins and keys. The textured wave pattern not only looks stunning but also provides a lovely tactile experience. Materials 100% cotton yarn (medium weight) Size G/6 (4mm) crochet hook Tapestry needle for weaving in ends Dimensions Length: 16 cm (6.
